etymology.description: дЇЉ (mouth) over зЪА (bowl of rice on a stand) -> depicts a bowl with a stand
etymology.interpretation: The character р†КК visually represents a mouth above a bowl of rice on a stand, indicating a utensil or vessel used for holding food. This image directly links to the idea of a 'bowl with stand.' The component зЪА specifically conveys the idea of a container or bowl elevated, which situates its primary meaning in the context of serving or holding food.

parts.english: bowl of rice on a stand
